programme.title: The Bold and the Beautiful
programme.desc: Ivy finds an ally in R.J.; Daphne turns to Carter for advice.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Jacob gets taught a rough lesson; Martin encourages Nicole to repair a fractured friendship; Joey issues an edict to Randy; Hayley celebrates a win; Chelsea and Kat worry their latest business success could get derailed due to Madison's lawsuit.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: "Entertainment Tonight" correspondent Emily Curl hits the Drew's News desk with Drew and Ross Mathews.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Paul Walter Hauser tells Drew about his new movie, "Balls Up.".

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.sub-title: Shih Tzu Shuttling!; Pit Bull Collateral Damage!
programme.desc: A woman is accused of refusing to return a dog to its rightful owner; neighbors fight over liability after a pit bull charges a woman and her daughter, forcing her to jump onto a car and damage it.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.sub-title: Skateboard Boy Wonder; Mud-Dragging, Big Tipper?!
programme.desc: A gifted youngster neglects to tell his father that he has been accused of vandalizing a neighbor's property; a hair-salon client accidentally tips her stylist more than $200, then is accused of slandering his business on the internet.

programme.title: Georgie & Mandy's First Marriage
programme.sub-title: Alpha Males and the Power of Prayer
programme.desc: Mandy tries to make things right with Pastor Jeff when she learns her controversial comments have hurt the tire store's business; Jim and Audrey butt heads over Connor's allowance.

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: Needing to raise a large sum of money to pay the IRS, Sam and Jay agree to host a high-stakes poker game at the mansion; in an act of generosity, Sass and Pete gift Jay's recliner to the basement ghosts.

programme.desc: As the team continues tracing Senior's money trail, they arrange a delicate meeting with a key accomplice, one that could expose them all; the team takes on a criminal justice student's personal case involving a hit and run.

programme.desc: Elsbeth organizes a book club to investigate a celebrated novelist who may have written the perfect crime.

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote & installation.

programme.title: CBS Evening News
programme.desc: Tony Dokoupil shares the day's most important stories, delivering context and depth to bring greater understanding to one's world.

programme.title: CBS News Roundup
programme.desc: The headlines one needs to know overnight... plus, a roundup of MoneyWatch, health, consumer and up-to-the-minute technology news, the latest weather, and inspiring stories of kindness and hope.

programme.title: CBS News Mornings
programme.desc: CBS News Mornings broadcasts on weekdays and offers viewers up-to-date news, comprehensive weather forecasts, and highlights from the world of sports.

programme.title: CBS Mornings
programme.desc: Reporting on international news stories, interviews, and in-depth pieces, covering topics from news, sports, climate and technology to race, health, parenting and personal finance.

programme.desc: Electra is stunned by the truth; R.J. admits where his animosity towards Will stems.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Dani questions Bill about his slip of the tongue; Naomi's at a loss; Vernon seeks out Madison for advice; Nicole and Vanessa get candid; Eva's not thrilled to see Izaiah and Kat catching up.

programme.desc: Sunny Anderson joins Drew to cover the latest headlines and give her best recommendations for the perfect weekend in an all-new Weekender segment.

programme.desc: Lena Dunham joins Drew to talk about her new memoir, "Famesick.".

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.sub-title: RV Trip From Hell!; Get Out ... but Keep Paying My Rent!
programme.desc: Mechanical failures plague a 10-day family road trip; an unwed mother sues her ex for two months of mortgage payments after he leaves his own home.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.sub-title: Deceased Dad's Truck Trouble; Firefighter Fun Cruise
programme.desc: A man says his ex-girlfriend's father gave him a truck as a gift; one firefighter denies owing another for his share of a cruise to the Bahamas.

programme.title: Sheriff Country
programme.sub-title: The Lost Girls of Edgewater County
programme.desc: To save one of her own, Sheriff Mickey Fox launches a race-against-time investigation that exposes long-buried secrets and a chilling pattern haunting Edgewater County.

programme.title: Fire Country
programme.desc: A routine response to a reported minor fire turns dangerous when the Station 42 team discovers the threat is far greater than dispatch indicated.

Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Boston Blue
programme.desc: When a Brooklyn homicide leads to a dangerous cross-city case, Danny and Lena reunite with Danny's former NYPD partner Maria Baez to uncover the truth and protect a vulnerable victim; the team confronts difficult family dynamics.

programme.title: CBS LA at 11pm
programme.desc: Join the CBS LA team for stories from communities around SoCal, breaking news from The Desk, and NEXT Weather from the Weathersphere.

programme.title: The Late Show With Stephen Colbert
programme.desc: Improv actor and comic Stephen Colbert flexes the hosting muscles he honed over nearly 1,500 episodes of the popular and critically celebrated "The Colbert Report" at the helm of this long-running late-night talk show. Following the genre's classic formula, each show kicks off with a monologue and a look at recent headlines, and features sketch comedy, celebrity interviews and musical performances. Joining Colbert is his bandleader, Julliard-trained Jon Batiste, and house band Stay Human. The show is filmed in New York's famed Ed Sullivan Theater, the longtime home of "The Late Show.".

programme.title: Made in Hollywood
programme.desc: Stay up-to-date with the latest releases in theaters and on DVD with this syndicated series that features interviews with all the big-name stars and a behind-the-screen segment filled with inside information.

programme.title: CBS Saturday Morning
programme.desc: Each Saturday morning, Adriana Diaz and Kelly O'Grady report on the week's top stories; the broadcast, known for its signature segments The Dish and Saturday Sessions, offers insightful conversations with artists, authors, chefs and musicians.

programme.title: Lucky Dog: Reunions
programme.desc: A bonded husky and chihuahua pair must be trained separately due to their size differences and contrasting work habits.

programme.title: Lucky Dog: Down Under
programme.desc: A teenager whose older siblings have moved out hopes that a staffie mix named Banksy will be the perfect companion to keep her company; a couple looking to adopt a Tibetan spaniel will need to see if their current dog approves of the match.

programme.title: Mission Unstoppable
programme.desc: A veterinary neurologist shows how she repairs spinal fractures; the neuroscience behind why one is afraid of failure; the future of medicine; how math can help one's short game in golf.

programme.title: The Visioneers With Zay Harding
programme.desc: Zay discovers how to upcycle signage and takes a hands-on approach to a cleaner tomorrow.
